free_text: Structure effects in the elastic scattering for the
Enriched 30 mu-g/cm2 46,50Ti targets with a 10 mu-g/cm2
a 500 mu-m position sensitive Si detector (PSD)
A monitor detector at 15. degr. and an electron
suppressed Faraday cup were also used for normalization
of the runs and absolute cross section determination.
Due to the good statistics, the cross
sections were determined with uncertainties of about 5%
